originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging Reward and Training Issues for a Physics-Based Arena Shooter Environment
summary: Worked with a contributor to debug a physics-based arena shooter RL environment, fixing a PufferLib action bug, adjusting reward structure and hyperparameters, and achieving basic learning behavior where agents learned to fire without self-harm. Identified further issues with self-play metrics and observation encoding.
